issues.title: URL prefix /news/ not registered — routing will 404
issues.attack: URLs use /news/ prefix but projects/urls.py is mounted at /projects/. All routes 404.
issues.response: Create projects/urls_news.py with top-level mount in main/urls.py, following urls_telegram.py pattern.

issues.title: relevance_projects JSONField breaks data integrity
issues.attack: JSON storage: no FK cascade, no reverse query, single score for multi-project relevance.
issues.response: Replace with NewsArticleRelevance join model. Remove is_pinned, derive from relevance at query time.

issues.title: No organization scoping — multi-tenant data leak
issues.attack: NewsSource/NewsArticle lack organization FK. Cross-org data exposure.
issues.response: Add organization FK to NewsSource. Views filter by user org.

issues.title: Pipeline lacks transactional/idempotent boundaries
issues.attack: No transaction.atomic(), no retry state, no idempotency in RSS-Gemini-matching pipeline.
issues.response: Add summary_status field, get_or_create for articles, atomic for updates, on_commit for Telegram.

issues.title: Cron execution mechanism undefined
issues.attack: No crontab, no lock, no env setup, no timezone specified for daily execution.
issues.response: Add concrete crontab spec with flock, env, timezone, logging.

issues.title: feedparser dependency not in pyproject.toml
issues.attack: feedparser not listed in project dependencies. ImportError on deploy.
issues.response: Add uv add feedparser as first implementation step.

issues.title: Category enum inconsistency between storage, AI output, and UI
issues.attack: English DB values vs Korean AI output; ECONOMY missing from UI filter.
issues.response: Enforce machine enum in summarizer prompt. Add ECONOMY to UI. Document mapping.

issues.title: SSRF risk from user-managed RSS URLs
issues.attack: User-supplied URLs fetched by server. No scheme/IP validation.
issues.response: Overstated for internal admin tool. Will add basic scheme validation and timeout. Full SSRF protection is over-engineering.

issues.title: Telegram delivery lacks recipient selection and dedup
issues.attack: All bound users get same global summary. No dedup, no rate limiting.
issues.response: Select recipients by org + project relevance. Dedupe by (date, recipient, type). Rate-limit sends.

issues.title: NewsSourceType TextChoices undefined; non-RSS parsing absent
issues.attack: No TextChoices for type field. YouTube/blog sources have no parsing path.
issues.response: Define NewsSourceType TextChoices. MVP: RSS only. YouTube/blog enum values reserved for future.

issues.title: Dot indicator needs user read-state tracking
issues.attack: No mechanism to determine 'new' per user for sidebar dot.
issues.response: Add last_news_seen_at field. Update on page visit.

issues.title: BaseModel inheritance not explicit in model skeletons
issues.attack: Spec says UUID PK + TimestampMixin but doesn't show BaseModel inheritance.
issues.response: Add explicit model class definitions.

issues.title: URL canonicalization for dedup
issues.attack: Same article via different URLs (AMP, mobile, tracking) can create duplicates.
issues.response: Premature optimization for Korean RSS feeds. feedparser link field provides adequate dedup. Can add later without schema change.

issues.title: is_pinned field semantics ambiguous
issues.attack: is_pinned as boolean conflicts with per-user relevance-based pinning.
issues.response: Remove is_pinned. Derive from relevance join model per D-R1-02 resolution.

issues.title: Auth specification missing for views
issues.attack: No @login_required or role requirements documented.
issues.response: Add @login_required for all views, staff role for source CRUD.

issues.title: Global URL unique vs org-scoped source
issues.attack: First org to fetch URL owns article; other orgs can't see it.
issues.response: Global URL uniqueness is correct. Visibility is org-scoped via source FK. Single-org deployment.

issues.title: Source deletion cascades to articles
issues.attack: Deleting RSS source destroys all article history and relevance rows.
issues.response: Change to on_delete=SET_NULL + nullable source. Or use soft delete (is_active=False).

issues.title: Fetcher ignores timeout/redirect/size controls
issues.attack: feedparser.parse(url) has no timeout, redirect limit, or size cap per design spec.
issues.response: Use httpx for HTTP fetch with timeout=30s, max_redirects=5, then pass bytes to feedparser.

issues.title: Digest ignores project relevance
issues.attack: Command sends all org news to all users instead of relevance-filtered digest.
issues.response: Build digest from NewsArticleRelevance per recipient's assigned projects.

issues.title: Dedupe not atomic
issues.attack: exists() + create() race condition can cause duplicate digests.
issues.response: Use get_or_create in transaction.atomic() for Notification dedup.

issues.title: No cron installation task
issues.attack: Command exists but no deployment task for crontab installation.
issues.response: Add deployment task with crontab file, env setup, flock, and smoke test.

issues.title: Sidebar dot checks all org news
issues.attack: Context processor queries all org news instead of user's related news.
issues.response: Query via NewsArticleRelevance + user's assigned projects.

issues.title: No stale relevance cleanup in matcher
issues.attack: Matcher only adds/updates rows. Stale relevances remain after project closure.
issues.response: Delete below-threshold and closed-project relevance rows in matcher.

issues.title: Summarizer has no article content input
issues.attack: Fetcher stores only title. Summarizer sends empty content to Gemini.
issues.response: Store RSS description in raw_content field for summarizer input.

issues.title: SSRF validation insufficient
issues.attack: URL scheme check alone insufficient for SSRF protection.
issues.response: Consistent with design D-R1-08 decision. Basic validation for admin-only tool.

issues.title: _is_staff check too restrictive
issues.attack: Only checks owner role. Design says staff/admin.
issues.response: Match codebase convention: owner role is the staff-equivalent in synco.

issues.title: Empty related articles header renders
issues.attack: Empty section header when user has no assigned projects.
issues.response: Template has {% if related_articles %} guard. Section only renders when articles exist.

issues.title: Test assertion too loose for non-staff access
issues.attack: Test uses status_code in (302, 403) instead of exact assertion.
issues.response: Use exact 403 status code assertion.

issues.title: Should use parse_llm_json utility
issues.attack: Summarizer uses json.loads() instead of existing parse_llm_json utility.
issues.response: Use parse_llm_json from data_extraction.services for consistency.
